properties.title: Israel-Hezbollah: Merkava tanks struck, Nabatieh
properties.summary: Hezbollah used Ababil drones to destroy two IDF Merkava tanks near Dabl, Nabatieh province. Part of ongoing Lebanon war ground campaign.

properties.title: Lebanon war: IDF displacement orders, civilian casualties
properties.summary: Israel issued new civilian displacement orders in southern Lebanon; 3 killed in airstrikes on May 25. Cumulative: 3,213 killed since March 2.

properties.title: IDF ground operations, southern Lebanon
properties.summary: Israel expanding ground operations in southern Lebanon per May 27 reports; Biranit camp drone strike killed 1 IDF soldier May 22.

properties.title: Gaza: ongoing IDF operations
properties.summary: IDF operations continuing in Gaza. Israeli security forces reportedly facilitated smuggling of unsupervised goods into Gaza (Haaretz, May 26).

properties.title: Ukraine-Russia: Frontline fighting
properties.summary: Continued artillery and drone exchanges along the frontline. Estimated 97 fatalities on combined sides on May 26.

properties.title: Nigeria: ADC election primary disputes, Delta/Nasarawa
properties.summary: ADC primary elections in Delta and Nasarawa states disrupted; candidate dispute in Delta; 4 LGAs elections cancelled in Nasarawa.

properties.title: IRGC sailors killed, Persian Gulf
properties.summary: 4 IRGC Navy sailors killed when US fighter jets targeted two Iranian speedboats in the Persian Gulf. Incident delayed-reported to protect ceasefire talks.

properties.title: Iran: ceasefire under pressure
properties.summary: US 'self-defense strikes' on Iranian missile launch sites; Iran accused US of 'grave violation'. Talks continuing in Doha via Qatari mediation.

properties.title: Sudan: Sahel conflict indicators
properties.summary: Ongoing conflict in Sudan; humanitarian crisis continues. No specific new ACLED event but persistent low-intensity fighting.

properties.title: Colombia: armed group activity
properties.summary: GDELT data flags Colombia with elevated armed group reporting. ELN/dissident FARC activity in border regions.

properties.title: FIRMS: Strait of Hormuz tanker corridor
properties.summary: Thermal anomalies in shipping lanes; mine-clearance operations ongoing. Insurance underwriters not yet fully reset.

properties.title: FIRMS: Novorossiysk oil terminal, Russia
properties.summary: Persistent thermal signature at Novorossiysk export terminal; EU 20th package may affect traffic.

properties.title: FIRMS: Bushehr nuclear complex, Iran
properties.summary: Monitoring thermal signature at Bushehr; subject to ceasefire terms and IAEA verification.
